title: Suspect in Mossel Bay flat murder makes first appearance in court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 39-year-old man arrested in connection with the murder of Heleen Annandale (62) made his first court appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 5 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 39-year-old man arrested in connection with the murder of Heleen Annandale (62) made his first court appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 5 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The accused, Sonwabile Mbambo, was arrested in KwaNonqaba less than 48 hours after Annandale’s body was found with a wound to the neck on Monday, 1 September.","html":"The accused, Sonwabile Mbambo, was arrested in KwaNonqaba less than 48 hours after Annandale’s body was found with a wound to the neck on Monday, 1 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbambo is facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle.","html":"Mbambo is facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case was postponed until 22 September for a formal bail application.","html":"The case was postponed until 22 September for a formal bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Woman found murdered in Mossel Bay flat","Vermoorde vrou se liggaam gevind nadat vriend haar as vermis aanmeld","Arrest made in Mossel Bay flat murder case"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Suspect in Mossel Bay flat murder makes first appearance in court
